ddls:
CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "sec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "sec_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol or ticker of the security */,
  "sec_name" TEXT /* Full name of the security */,
  "sec_type" TEXT /* Type of the security (e.g., stock, bond, ETF) */,
  "sec_exchange" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the security is traded */,
  "sec_sector" INTEGER /* ID of the sector of the security */,
  "sec_industry" INTEGER /* ID of the industry of the security */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the security */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the security's metadata */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the security is listed */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the security is traded */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) of the security */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_securities_sec_industry FOREIGN KEY ("sec_industry") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_securities_sec_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("sec_exchange") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_securities_sec_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sec_sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_data" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "sec_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the security */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the security */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the security during the trading day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the security during the trading day */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Total amount traded (volume * average price) */,
  "adj_factor" REAL /* Adjustment factor for the trade data */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price of the security */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* After-market price of the security */,
  "vwap" REAL /* Volume Weighted Average Price (VWAP) of the security */,
  "trade_source" TEXT /* Source of the trade data (e.g., exchange, third-party provider) */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., regular, auction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_data_sec_id FOREIGN KEY ("sec_id") REFERENCES securities ("sec_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., Research, Trading, Compliance) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the trade data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the trade data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for tracking user sessions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trading_data ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours of the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the exchange is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the sector in the market */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the sector's metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the industry in the market */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the industry's metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "sec_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading session */,
  "session_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trading session */,
  "session_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trading session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trading session (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "total_volume" TEXT /* Total volume traded during the session */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price during the session */,
  "trading_volume" TEXT /* Trading volume during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_sec_id FOREIGN KEY ("sec_id") REFERENCES securities ("sec_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price adjustment */,
  "sec_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "adjustment_date" TEXT /* Date of the price adjustment */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the price adjustment (e.g., stock split, dividend) */,
  "factor" REAL /* Adjustment factor applied to the price */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the adjustment */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the adjustment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the adjustment (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_adjustments_sec_id FOREIGN KEY ("sec_id") REFERENCES securities ("sec_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index */,
  "index_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the market index */,
  "index_exchange" TEXT /* Name of the exchange where the index is traded */,
  "index_sector" TEXT /* Sector of the market index */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the index's metadata */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the index in the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_indices" (
  "sec_index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the relationship */,
  "sec_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market index */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the security in the index */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the security's inclusion in the index */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the security's inclusion in the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sec_index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_indices_sec_id FOREIGN KEY ("sec_id") REFERENCES securities ("sec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_indices_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id")
)
